execution_boundary.summary: Continuation rules can influence whether an agent proceeds toward execution.

preparation_boundary.summary: Agent continuation checks can identify preparation states requiring review.

commitment_boundary.summary: Whether an agent may continue is adjacent to whether a transition may bind consequence.

semantic_equivalence_boundary.summary: Continuation rules need action normalization to compare semantically equivalent paths.

unknown_trajectory_boundary.summary: Unknown continuation states should route to escalation or fail-closed review.

authority_boundary.summary: Playbook guidance does not grant StegVerse authority.

evidence_freshness_boundary.summary: Continuation decisions require current evidence and context.

reconstruction_boundary.summary: Continuation decisions require preserved rationale and evidence for reconstruction.

interoperability_path.summary: Playbook guidance can enter as policy/evidence context for Commitment Candidate review.

next_required_action: add continuation-state fixture for preparation and unknown-trajectory benchmark cases
